tools.Name: browser-use
tools.Description: A package that makes websites accessible for AI agents, allowing them to automate browser tasks like form-filling, navigating, and data extraction.
tools.Use_Case: Automating web-based tasks such as job applications, grocery shopping, or personal assistant workflows.

tools.Name: LightRAG
tools.Description: A simple and fast RAG system that uses knowledge graphs and retrieval-augmented generation to improve query performance and knowledge extraction.
tools.Use_Case: Building production-grade research assistants, knowledge management systems, and advanced document querying applications.

tools.Name: DeerFlow
tools.Description: An open-source super agent harness that orchestrates sub-agents, memory, and sandboxed execution environments for complex tasks.
tools.Use_Case: Automating long-running multi-step research or coding tasks that require planning, research, and sandboxed execution.
